finding.summary: Demonstrate the report-only contract without asserting that the observed source is stale.

freshness.resumeTrigger: A documentation owner chooses to evaluate the fixture against a changed candidate contract.

recovery.quarantine: Move only the candidate to the retained quarantine route and preserve its identity.
recovery.revocation: Revoke any later publication approval if target revision or owner truth changes.
recovery.rollback: Remove no current owner; discard or quarantine this report-only fixture.

limitations: This candidate is a local contract fixture, not an observed stale-document claim.
nonClaims: It grants no edit, review, approval, publication, provider, or external-state authority.
